title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF DESPUJOLS, PROVINCE OF ROMBLON, TO SAN ANDRES.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3026 / 58 OG No. 23, 4270 (June 4, 1962)

[ REPUBLIC ACT No. 3358, June 18, 1961 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF DESPUJOLS, PROVINCE OF ROMBLON, TO SAN ANDRES.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Municipality of Despujols, Province of Romblon, shall hereafter be known as the Municipality of San Andres.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted, without Executive approval, June 18, 1961.
